chrome.noHealthData: Not enough data yet for a reliable analysis.

health.lowConv: Low conversion to a paid plan.
health.regDrop: Drop in new registrations vs last month.
health.churn: High share of paid companies without activity (churn risk).
health.allNorm: All key metrics are within norm.

insight.conv: Conversion to a paid plan is {conv}% ({paid} of {total}).
insight.awaiting: {n} companies requested a paid plan but have no recorded payment.
insight.trialExp: {n} trial accounts expire within the next 7 days.
insight.managed: Accounting firms brought {pct}% of the new companies this month.
insight.topPlan: The most chosen paid plan is {plan} ({n} companies).
insight.planChanges: {n} subscription changes in the last 30 days.
insight.cancellations: {n} cancelled/expired subscriptions in the last 30 days.
insight.none: Not enough data yet for a reliable analysis.

opp.nearLimit: {name} is near its plan limit ({used}/{limit}) — likely upgrade.
opp.hotLead: Hot lead: {name} (score {score}/100) — ready for a paid plan.
opp.firmNearLimit: Accounting firm “{name}” is nearing its limit of {limit} clients — potential for a higher plan.
opp.none: Keep monitoring — opportunities will appear as data accumulates.

attention.failed: {n} failed emails in the last 30 days
attention.none: No events requiring attention right now.
